displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Place Bihun (Rice Vermicelli) into boiling water, simmer for about 1 minute
2. Drain the Bihun and it is ready to be cooked as the dish you like

metaData.Ingredients: Red Rice, Rice, Sago Starch, Corn Starch
metaData.Key Information: Chilli Brand Red Rice Vermicelli is a healthier choice vermicelli made from red rice, which is higher in wholegrains, fibre, iron and antioxidants. It is an easy and delicious way to incorporate more wholegrains into your diet.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Soak Chilli Brand Red Rice Vermicelli in water for 5-10 minutes until softened
2. Drain and set aside for use
3. Suitable for various cooking methods
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

metaData.Key Information: Golden Lion Brand Thai Rice Vermicelli is an authentic original Thai cuisine. It has no preservatives added, gluten free and made 100% from Thai rice.

1. Put rice vermicelli into boiling water, simmer for 3 minutes and drain

• Directions:
1. Gradually put Tai Sun Flour Vermicelli into 1000ml of boiling water for a little while, drained dry
2. Add garnish to your own choice
3. Delicious dry or soup Flour Vermicelli will be ready
• Others:
Get ready boiling stock put in Tai Sun Flour Vermicelli garnished according to your own choice, thus, a bowl of delicious, traditional flour vermicelli soup is ready to serve
metaData.Storage Information: Keep in cool and dry place

product.description: Accredited Low GI by Temasek Polytechnic Singapore

metaData.Ingredients: Brown Rice, Sago Starch, Corn Starch
metaData.Key Information: Are you tired of the usual plain rice for every main meal? Try ecoBrown Brown Rice Vermicelli for a different twist on the old tradition. With all the goodness of brown rice, you will love the versatility of our healthy vermicelli as it is low in sodium and gluten free. A healthier choice for you and your family!
metaData.Preparation:
1. Soak vermicelli in water to soften it
2. Drain the water before cooking
3. ecoBrown's brown rice vermicelli can be served in soup or stir fry according to own preference and recipe
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place with proper ventilation

product.name: Chilli Brand Rice Vermicelli - Fish Head

metaData.Preparation:
1. Put vermicelli in boiling water for about 5 to 7 minutes
2. When vermicelli are cooked, drain away the water
3. Fry ingredients of your choice eg. meat, seafood, vegetables, etc in hot pan then add vermicelli and fry evenly
4. Season to taste and serve

tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: Simply Natural Brown Rice Vermicelli is a delicious gluten-free vermicelli made with brown rice and sago starch. It can be used in stir fry dishes, soups and salads. Unlike typical vermicelli, our noodle only requires a pre-cooking soak of about 10 minutes - making it a quick and easy preparation for dishes.
metaData.Preparation: Simply Natural Brown Rice Vermicelli is a delicious gluten-free vermicelli made with brown rice and sago starch. It can be used in stir fry dishes, soups and salads. Unlike typical vermicelli, our noodle only requires a pre-cooking soak of about 10 minutes - making it a quick and easy preparation for dishes.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place.
